channel.title: Settlement Watch - Healthcare
channel.description: Legal settlements from courts and regulators - Healthcare

item.title: Cambridge Retirement System v. Amneal Pharmaceuticals, Inc.AMN
[$33.75M] Multiplan Healthcare Class Action
item.description: Multiplan reaches $33.75M payment in healthcare class action lawsuit.

item.title: [$46M] Kaiser Permanente Data Settlement
item.description: Kaiser Permanente members eligible for cash payments in $46 million settlement. Check eligibility.

item.title: [$2.67B] Blue Cross Blue Shield Antitrust Settlement
item.description: Blue Cross Blue Shield antitrust settlement payments finally being distributed. One of the largest healthcare settlements.

item.title: CVS OTC Benefits, Over the Counter Health Solutions – CVS Pharmacy
item.description: CVS® makes it easy to redeem OTC benefits. Pay nothing out of pocket for select over-the-counter eligible products like vitamins, cold, medicine, eye care and more.

item.title: Bipolar mania and hypomania in adults: Choosing pharmacotherapy
item.description: Jun 21, 2024 · This topic reviews choosing pharmacotherapy for acute mania and hypomania in adults. The general principles of administering pharmacotherapy for acute mania and hypomania in adults …

item.title: What Are the Treatments for Bipolar Mania? - WebMD
item.description: Sep 17, 2024 · Learn more from WebMD about various drug and nondrug treatments for mania in people who suffer from bipolar disorder.

item.title: List of 13 Mania Medications Compared - Drugs.com
item.description: Compare risks and benefits of common medications used for Mania. Find the most popular drugs, view ratings and user reviews.
